---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The outcome you want

What are you trying to achieve? Describe the result, not just the mechanism.
Who is the operator or builder that benefits, and what does it let them do?

## The problem today

What is missing or awkward right now? What workaround are you using?

## Proposed solution

How might the console support this? Which module or surface would it live in?
If it touches an entity collection, remember the console standard: create,
read, update, delete, plus the actions that manage the underlying system.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or references. Redact anything internal or sensitive.
